Fitness made simple for busy women 35+

Become the Woman Who Makes Herself a Priority

The woman who has energy when she wakes up.

Who keeps promises to herself.

Who feels strong, confident, and at peace.

Who takes care of herself without guilt because she knows everyone benefits when her cup is full.

My Fitness Bestie Coaching helps you rebuild the habits, strength, confidence, and consistency that allow you to take care of yourself while still showing up for the people you love.

You were never meant to pour from your cup.

Your cup should stay full. Life should be poured from the saucer — the overflow. But so many women spend years giving to everyone around them until there is nothing left for themselves.

Not through perfection. Not through restriction. Not through another extreme program. Through simple, sustainable habits that fit your real life.

Show Me How It Works See the Programs

The problem isn’t that you don’t care.

You do care.

You want to be healthier.

You want more energy.

You want to feel stronger, more confident, and more comfortable in your own skin.

You want to take better care of yourself.

You want to feel good when you look in the mirror.

You want to show up as your best self for the people you love.

The problem isn’t a lack of desire.

The problem is that you’ve been given so much conflicting information that it’s hard to know what actually works.

One person says cut carbs. Another says count macros. Someone else says intermittent fasting. Social media says one thing. Your friends say another.

And somehow you’re supposed to take all of that information, fit it into your busy life, stay consistent, and get results.

No wonder so many women feel overwhelmed.

You don’t need another random fitness tip. You need a simple plan. A clear path. And someone who can help you connect the dots between knowing what to do and actually doing it consistently.

That’s where My Fitness Bestie comes in.

A simpler way forward.

My Fitness Bestie Coaching was created for women who are ready to stop putting themselves last and start building a healthier life that actually fits.

  • Sustainable fitness habits
  • Simple nutrition strategies
  • Strength and confidence
  • Accountability and support
  • Real-life consistency
  • No extreme diets, no all-or-nothing thinking, and no perfection required

The BESTIE Method

A supportive framework for building habits, confidence, and consistency one real-life win at a time.

B

Build simple habits

No perfection. No extremes. Just sustainable actions you can repeat.

E

Establish consistency

Small wins build momentum, and momentum changes everything.

S

Strengthen your body

Build strength, energy, resilience, and confidence in your body.

T

Take back your time

Create routines that fit your real schedule, not someone else’s fantasy life.

I

Invest in yourself

Learn how to prioritize your health without guilt.

E

Elevate your confidence

Feel stronger physically, mentally, and emotionally.

You don’t have to do this alone.

My goal isn’t to help you become perfect.

My goal is to help you become the woman who makes herself a priority — one habit, one workout, and one win at a time.

And if you’ve ever felt like you should be able to do this on your own, I want you to know something:

It’s okay to need support.

The most successful women in the world don’t do everything alone. They have coaches, mentors, friends, communities, and people who help them stay focused on the goals that matter most.

Support doesn’t mean you’re weak. It means you’re human.

Sometimes the difference between where you are and where you want to be isn’t more willpower — it’s having someone in your corner who believes in you, encourages you, and helps you keep moving forward when life gets busy.

Because lasting change isn’t built on motivation alone. It’s built on support, encouragement, guidance, and small actions repeated over time.

You don’t have to do this alone. And you were never meant to. That’s what a Fitness Bestie is for.

Why this work matters to me.

Fitness has helped me lose more than 70 pounds, build confidence, and come back to myself through real life transitions.

I've always believed in the power of fitness.

Over the years, it's helped me lose more than 70 pounds, build confidence, and create a healthier life for myself.

But the reason fitness means so much to me today has very little to do with the number on a scale.

Like many women, I've gone through seasons of stress, uncertainty, change, and major life transitions.

And during those seasons, fitness became more than exercise.

It became a way to reconnect with myself. A way to clear my mind. A way to build confidence when life felt overwhelming. A way to keep a promise to myself, even on the hard days.

I've learned that fitness isn't really about becoming a different person.

It's about coming home to the person you already are.

It's about remembering that your health matters too.

That's why I created My Fitness Bestie.

Not to help women chase perfection, but to help women build strength, confidence, consistency, and a healthier relationship with themselves.

Because I've experienced firsthand what can happen when a woman starts making herself a priority again.

And now I get to help other women do the same.

Choose your level of support.

Start where you are. Choose the level of guidance that fits your life, your goals, and your season.

Hi, I’m Stacie — your Fitness Bestie.

I help busy women build strength, confidence, and sustainable habits without guilt, extremes, or perfection pressure.

I’m an NPTI Certified Personal Trainer, NASM Women’s Fitness Specialist, Fitness & Wellness Coach, and author of So… You Joined the Gym, Now What?

But more importantly, I’m a woman who understands how easy it is to put yourself last.

My goal isn’t to help you become perfect. My goal is to help you become the woman who makes herself a priority — one habit, one workout, and one win at a time.

Your next chapter starts today.

You deserve the same care, energy, and attention that you give everyone else.
